src/main/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3 environment as it has been replaced by jakarta.annotation.

src/main/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.general_idea: Update import path for GroupedOpenApi to match SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x package structure.
src/main/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.why_exists: The class org.springdoc.core.GroupedOpenApi was moved to org.springdoc.core.models.GroupedOpenApi in SpringDoc 2.x; using the old path causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
src/main/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol) if not updated to jakarta.persistence.

src/test/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.general_idea: Replace deprecated ResponseStatusException.getStatus() with ResponseStatusException.getStatusCode() in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/test/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.why_exists: getStatus() is deprecated in Spring Framework 6.x / Spring Boot 3.x; using it may cause compile warnings or errors depending on strictness, and getStatusCode() is the correct API.
